text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out shopping when I catch sight of a younger
Umamusume with what looks like a Tracen
student.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wooow, what a cute bow! ♪ I want the same one!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks! ☆ It's one of my faves! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Why don't we look for one together?! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Not this one... or this one. It's not here...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well... what about this one? Don't you think the
frills are super cute?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
B-b-but I want the one you have... I wanna be as
cute as you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can be cute wearing other bows! ♪ You over
there! You think so too, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
See? ☆ Everyone's cute in their own special way!
That means you too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: R-really? I'm cute in my own way?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course! ♪ Let's find you your very own style of
cute—one even I can't copy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! So, like... like... which one do you think
is my type?!
choice_data_list:
Something with an intellectual look might be
good.
Something super energetic would be good!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah! ☆ I bet that'll look super cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In fact, let's not stop at a bow. Let's throw in a
trendy pair of glasses too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I want glasses too! I wanna be cute, after
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you've awoken to your inner
cuteness! ☆ Let's keep getting cuter and cuter! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two head toward a variety store in
search of greater cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think that would be really cute! ♪ Like a
cool aqua blue, or a cheerful yellow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do I do?! Everything's starting to look
cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Reeeeally rack your brains! ☆ You're extra
super-duper cute when you're trying so hard to
get cuter! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two enjoy the rest of their shopping, carefully
scrutinizing all of their options.
